title: urachne coerulescens
intro: Urachne coerulescens, also known as Blue Samphire or Blue Kandarian, is a type of plant species within the family Cyperaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Urachne coerulescens include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
